item.title: OptaSTATS: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 7h Tonight, Aaron Judge and Mike Trout each hit two home runs, the secon
item.description: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 7h Tonight, Aaron Judge and Mike Trout each hit two home runs, the second time in MLB history where two three-time MVPs each hit multiple home runs in the same game. The first was June 21, 1956, when Stan Musial and Roy Campanella each hit two homers. 3 87 389 16 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 5h Dave McGinnis coached in the NFL for 30 years before returning to Titans as a radio an
item.description: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 5h Dave McGinnis coached in the NFL for 30 years before returning to Titans as a radio analyst. "Coach Mac" died Monday at the age of 74. De nfl.com 1 5 8 mil
